name: should handle player_air_yards_share_from_plays
description: Test case for should handle player_air_yards_share_from_plays
expected_query: with "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", CASE WHEN SUM(nfl_plays.dot) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0), 2) ELSE 0 END as air_yds_share_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."nfl_team" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "pg"."season_year" in (2023) group by "pg"."pid" having CASE WHEN SUM(nfl_plays.dot) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0), 2) ELSE 0 END >= '25'), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933"."air_yds_share_from_plays" AS "air_yds_share_from_plays_0", player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933" on "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933"."air_yds_share_from_plays", player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
